nasb.text: Let no one look down on your youthfulness, but rather in speech, conduct, love, faith and purity, show yourself an example of those who believe.

esv.text: Let no one despise you for your youth, but set the believers an example in speech, in conduct, in love, in faith, in purity.

cnv.text: 不要叫人小看你年輕，總要在言語、行為、愛心、信心和純潔上，都作信徒的榜樣。

ccb.text: 不要因为年轻而叫人小看你，总要在言语、行为、爱心、信心和纯洁各方面做信徒的榜样。

csbs.text: 不要让任何人轻看你年少，反要在言语、行为、爱心、信仰、纯洁的事上，都做信徒的榜样。
